title: Cobblemon : Remixed Shinies
description: Remixes the sounds and looks of the sparkles that shiny cobblemon give off.
body: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/IMjOoSDBScQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>With the Release of shiny sparkles in cobblemon in the past updates, I decided to remix the sounds and the looks of the shiny sparkles! giving them a mix feel of their cobblemon counterpart and the feel from the games as well.
